languages.original_text: "Hardly. But it is what was on my mind when you approached, and I thought it an interesting topic for discussion."

languages.text: "Отнюдь. Но это то, что было у меня на уме, когда вы подошли, и я счел это любопытной темой для обсуждения".
"Hardly. But it is what was on my mind when you approached, and I thought it an interesting topic for discussion."

languages.text: «En absoluto. Lo tenía en mente cuando se acercó y me pareció un tema de debate interesante».
languages.original_text: "Hardly. But it is what was on my mind when you approached, and I thought it an interesting topic for discussion."

traits.locale_text: «En absoluto. Lo tenía en mente cuando se acercó y me pareció un tema de debate interesante».

languages.text: “倒也不是。只是您来的时候我正好在想这个问题，觉得挺适合拿来讨论的。”
languages.original_text: "Hardly. But it is what was on my mind when you approached, and I thought it an interesting topic for discussion."

traits.locale_text: “倒也不是。只是您来的时候我正好在想这个问题，觉得挺适合拿来讨论的。”

languages.text: « Pas vraiment, non. Mais c'est à elle que je pensais quand vous êtes {mf|arrivé|arrivée}, et je me suis dit que c'était un bon sujet de discussion. »
languages.original_text: "Hardly. But it is what was on my mind when you approached, and I thought it an interesting topic for discussion."

traits.locale_text: « Pas vraiment, non. Mais c'est à elle que je pensais quand vous êtes {mf|arrivé|arrivée}, et je me suis dit que c'était un bon sujet de discussion. »

languages.text: "Wohl kaum. Aber das kam mir bei Eurer Ankunft in den Sinn, und ich hielt es für ein interessantes Gesprächsthema."
languages.original_text: "Hardly. But it is what was on my mind when you approached, and I thought it an interesting topic for discussion."

traits.locale_text: "Wohl kaum. Aber das kam mir bei Eurer Ankunft in den Sinn, und ich hielt es für ein interessantes Gesprächsthema."

languages.text: 「ほとんどない。でも、あなたが近づいてきたときに気になっていたことで、興味深い話題だと思ったんです」。
languages.original_text: "Hardly. But it is what was on my mind when you approached, and I thought it an interesting topic for discussion."

languages.text: "Pek sayılmaz. Fakat sen geldiğinde aklımda bu vardı ve tartışmak için ilginç bir konu olduğunu düşündüm."
languages.original_text: "Hardly. But it is what was on my mind when you approached, and I thought it an interesting topic for discussion."

traits.locale_text: "Pek sayılmaz. Fakat sen geldiğinde aklımda bu vardı ve tartışmak için ilginç bir konu olduğunu düşündüm."
